name: 10 thousand km, back to Japan
original_name: 10 Mil Km, De Regresso ao Japão
overview:
What could two countries as far apart as Japan and Portugal possibly have in common? In fact, there is a 500-year-old exchange to discover, revealed in gastronomy, objects, fashion, and language.

In 15 episodes, we explore this unique bridge of a centuries-old friendship that so few people know about.

trailers.title: 10,000 KM BACK TO JAPAN - Premieres November 15th, Saturday, at 11:30 PM on RTP News.
